$schema: Test user metadata for the Maestro flows. Real credentials live in config/.env, never in this file.

users.description: Primary test user. Pre-existing in the Clerk dev instance.
Used by sign-out-then-sign-in-different-user flow. Provision separately.
Generated per run with the +clerk_test pattern so verification codes auto-resolve.

notes: Use +clerk_test addresses to bypass captcha and get higher rate limits.
Document any new test users you add here so future devs know what they're for.
